        SRIM-2013.00
=========================================
        Replacement Collisions       
 See SRIM Outputs\TDATA.txt for calc. details   
=========================================
 See file: SRIM Outputs\TDATA.txt for data about the calculation

============= TARGET MATERIAL ======================================
Layer  1 : Si Solid
Layer Width =     5.E+04 AAA ;
  Layer # 1- Density = 4.976E22 atoms/cm3 = 2.321 g/cm3
  Layer # 1- Si = 100  Atomic Percent = 100  Mass Percent
